positive: A minimalist, high-contrast depiction of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The central subject is a stylized, glowing crescent moon hovering above a forest of silhouetted, ancient trees and various bioluminescent flora. Focus on clean, graphic shapes and strong negative space. The style should evoke Art Deco meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, using a limited palette of deep indigo, emerald green, gold, and charcoal black. Composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as an impactful textile pattern. Use crisp linework, strong edges, and dramatic rim lighting on the glowing elements. High detail, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing.
